title: FinderSync generic Phase 2 menu and native confirmation
action: Replace debug-only FinderSync behavior with config-driven menu items and one generic CLI invocation path.
implementation: Extend Swift SRightConfig/MenuItem decoding with dangerous_confirmation and dangerous.
Build one NSMenuItem for each enabled menu item in config.menus.
Store action id on NSMenuItem.representedObject and route all clicks through one @objc handler.
Collect selectedItemURLs paths exactly once per action.
If the item is dangerous and config confirmation is enabled, show an NSAlert; only append --confirmed-dangerous when user confirms.
Invoke sright-cli action run --id <action-id> --path <path> for each selected path, preserving current CLI executable discovery.

criteria: rg 'debugActionID' native/macos/FinderSyncExtension/FinderSync.swift exits non-zero or only appears in legacy diagnostic code
xcodebuild -project native/macos/sRightNative.xcodeproj -scheme SRightFinderSync -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO exits zero
